name: Corporate
description: HR-first portfolio for corporate professionals — finance, accounting, banking, law, HR, and business management. Designed around how recruiters actually evaluate candidates: credentials as proof, quantified achievements as the portfolio, endorsements as social proof.
designNotes: The Corporate template is designed around HR evaluation patterns, not visual aesthetics. Research shows recruiters spend 6 seconds scanning: job title, company names, numbers, and credentials — in that order. The template puts all four above the fold. Certifications are elevated to a trust bar immediately after the hero (they ARE the skill proof for desk jobs). 'Projects' is replaced by 'Impact Stories' using anonymized STAR format — because corporate professionals' best work is internal and confidential. Endorsements from managers provide social proof that desk workers otherwise lack. Skill bars are removed (meaningless self-assessment) in favor of grouped competency tags. Every experience bullet must contain a quantified metric. The template itself demonstrates the candidate's communication and presentation skills.
